title: 2026-03-02 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 19.09
description: Automated market-pressure update for 2026-03-02: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 19.09/100, signaling a low pressure regime as volatility and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. Explore the score history, daily post, and the four-factor dashboard.
